title: Research-Quality Hardening Sprint
acceptance_criteria: ADR-018, ADR-019, ADR-020 drafts merged under docs/adr/_drafts/
docs/governance/multiplicity_ledger writer spec implemented or fully specified
docs/governance/holdout_discipline manifest + hook spec implemented or fully specified

docs/governance/research_quality_kpis.md operator-visible per release
docs/governance/paper_readiness_checklist schema implemented or fully specified
routing/sampling/scoring reason-record schemas implemented or fully specified
validation_requirements: ADR-018 promoted via separate governance-bootstrap PR or kept in _drafts/

title: Minimal v3.15.16 Intelligent Routing slice
acceptance_criteria: Routing prioritizes by expected information gain over existing preset universe
Dead-zone suppression active
Routing-reason records emitted per decision
No diagnostic-aware, state-aware, source-quality-aware, retrieval-aware, or knowledge-aware routing in this slice
notes: Minimal slice. Shipped via PR #268 (merge d9ad118) as reporting/intelligent_routing_minimal.py + reporting/reason_records.py sibling-to-existing-advisory layer; operator runbook docs/governance/intelligent_routing_minimal.md.

title: Minimal v3.15.17 Sampling Intelligence slice
acceptance_criteria: Stratified sampling over existing coverage
Null-baseline control sampling
Sampling-reason records emitted per decision
No tail/entropy/phase-transition/barrier/resonance/network/post-shock sampling families in this slice
notes: Minimal slice. Shipped via PR #270 (merge 7356ebb) as reporting/sampling_intelligence_minimal.py reusing reporting/reason_records.py; operator runbook docs/governance/sampling_intelligence_minimal.md.

title: Minimal v3.15.18 Research Observability Expansion slice
acceptance_criteria: Candidate-quality dashboard panel exposes the seven KPIs from research_quality_kpis.md
Operator-attention-budget enforced (visible-surfaces-per-campaign cap)
Routing/sampling/scoring reason-record surfaces available
Multiplicity-ledger summary surface available
Hold-out lineage surface available
validation_requirements: dashboard/dashboard.py not modified (governance-bootstrap follow-up if wiring required)
notes: Minimal slice. Shipping as reporting/research_observability_minimal.py (read-only aggregator over routing-minimal + sampling-minimal + reason-records + KPI-doctrine pointer; operator-attention-budget cap enforced); operator runbook docs/governance/research_observability_minimal.md. Multiplicity-ledger summary surface and hold-out lineage surface deferred to the canonical KPI artefact PR (separate operator-driven). No KG visualization, no retrieval debug surfaces, no full lineage UI, no source-quality dashboards (Addendums 1/2/3 deferred). Operator transitions to done after merge.

title: Minimal v3.15.19 Hypothesis Discovery Engine slice
acceptance_criteria: ADR-019 promoted out of _drafts/ before this slice begins
behavior_catalog, behavior_hypotheses, opportunity_scoring (per ADR-019 axioms), preset_feasibility, campaign_seed_proposer modules ship
Three active diagnostics (null-model, tail, entropy) used as FILTERS, not seeds
opportunity_probability_score axiom property tests green
Null-pipeline integration test remains green with Discovery enabled
No external_intelligence_catalog, no physics_behavior_catalog, no mechanistic_behavior_catalog, no state/knowledge/retrieval/source adapters
validation_requirements: property tests for score axioms green
notes: Seeds-not-candidates contract. Discovery proposes only; funnel policy promotes (ADR-014).

title: STOP - operator review gate after minimal v3.15.19
acceptance_criteria: Operator reviews KPIs from research_quality_kpis.md after minimal v3.15.19 slice
Operator decides: proceed with staged diagnostic rollout / simplify / halt
Reactivation of any deferred Addendum subsection requires explicit operator-approved ADR per roadmap_scope_status.md sec 4
No automatic diagnostic / source / retrieval / state / KG / adaptive activation
validation_requirements: KPI snapshot exists for the release
No deferred-scope item is in active queue at gate time
notes: Hard STOP. The autonomous PR runner may not advance past this item without explicit operator authorisation; reactivation gates in roadmap_scope_status.md sec 4 govern.
